data.title: AccuKnox partners with SecuVerse.ai for Zero Trust CNAPP Security for LONACI; delivered ASPM for national gaming infrastructure.
data.description: AccuKnox, a renowned Zero Trust Cloud Native Application Protection Platforms company based in Menlo Park, California, announced its collaboration with SecuVerse.ai on August 7, 2025. This partnership aims to provide Lonaci Loterie Nationale de Côte d'Ivoire (LONACI) with Application Security Posture Management (ASPM) services. As a global leader in this field, AccuKnox's expertise in CNAPP combined with SecuVerse.ai's capabilities will enhance security measures for LONACI.

data.title: Safe Pro Group patents AI technology internationally, detecting 31,600 explosive threats from 1.78M images in Ukraine.
data.description: A patented AI-powered computer vision technology has analyzed more than 1.78 million battlefield images from Ukraine and successfully identified over 31,600 real-world explosive threats.

data.title: Locksley Resources Ltd. (ASX: LKY; OTCQB: LKYRF) appoints Tribeca Capital as strategic advisor. Strengthening U.S. critical minerals growth strategy.
data.description: Locksley Resources Ltd. (ASX: LKY; OTCQB: LKYRF) based in San Bernardino, California, revealed on August 7, 2025, that they have named Tribeca Capital Pte. Ltd. as their strategic advisor. This move aims to enhance Locksley's operations related to their U.S.-aligned critical initiatives.

data.title: Datadog stock surges after beating Q2 earnings and revenue estimates; sales guidance exceeds expectations amid concerns about OpenAI and Amazon.
data.description: Datadog's stock surged following the release of their Q2 financial results, which exceeded expectations in both earnings and revenue. In addition, their sales guidance for the near future surpassed predictions. The positive news caused a notable increase in Datadog's stock price. This success comes amidst concerns surrounding OpenAI and Amazon, but Datadog managed to outperform these worries.

data.title: D-Wave's Q2 loss wider than expected, stock falls; revenue beats views. Post by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: After the announcement of its Q2 financial results, D-Wave's stock experienced a drop following a larger-than-projected loss. Despite this setback, the company exceeded revenue expectations. This update on Quantum Computing Stocks showcases D-Wave's Earnings missing estimates while revenue surpasses projections, indicating potential growth in the sector.

data.title: SharkNinja exceeds Q2 estimates, raises full-year guidance, stock rises, strong showing in Q2.
data.description: SharkNinja exceeded second-quarter expectations and increased its projected earnings slightly higher than anticipated for the year. As a result, SharkNinja's stock experienced a rise following the news.

data.title: Trump threatens 100% tariff on chips, excludes giants like Apple, Taiwan Semiconductor; their stocks rise.
data.description: President Trump has announced plans to impose a 100% tariff on chips, with exceptions for companies like Apple and Taiwan Semiconductor. Despite the tariff threat, both companies have seen their stocks rise. This decision has sparked interest and speculation among investors and the business community.

data.title: Oncor reported Q2 2025 net income of $259 million, up from $251 million in Q2 2024, a $8 million increase.
data.description: In Dallas on August 7, 2025, Oncor Electric Delivery Company LLC (Oncor) disclosed a net income of $259 million for the quarter finishing on June 30, 2025, showcasing growth from the $251 million net income in the same period of 2024. This $8 million rise in net income demonstrates Oncor's financial progress over the respective three-month periods.
